title: Skyrim Stamina
description: Bringing Skyrim's stamina mechanics into Vanilla minecraft
body:
# Skyrim Stamina

**Skyrim Stamina** completely overhauls Minecraft's hunger system, replacing it with a dynamic stamina bar that governs your ability to sprint. Say goodbye to food management and hello to action-focused gameplay!

---

### 🏃 Stamina-Based Sprinting
- **100 Stamina Points** - Your energy for sprinting
- **Drain Rate**: 0.5 stamina per tick while sprinting
- **Regeneration**: 1.0 stamina per tick when not sprinting
- **Visual Display**: Uses vanilla hunger bar icons (no resource pack needed!)

### 😮‍💨 Exhaustion System
When your stamina hits zero, you'll become **exhausted**:
- Cannot sprint for **3 seconds**
- Stamina regenerates at only **30% speed**

### 🍖 Food = Healing
Food no longer satisfies hunger - instead it provides **instant healing**!
- Each nutrition point = **0.5 hearts healed**
- Perfect for combat situations
- No more waiting for regeneration


## 🔗 Compatibility

- ✅ Works in **Singleplayer** and **Multiplayer**
- ✅ Compatible with most **food mods** (they provide healing)
- ✅ Uses **vanilla textures** - no additional downloads needed
- ✅ Use the **Skyrim Overlay** mod for skyrim sprinting textures!
- ⚠️ May conflict with mods that heavily modify sprinting mechanics
- ⚠️ Disables vanilla hunger - not compatible with hunger-focused mods

---

## 📝 Changelog

### Version 1.0.0
- Initial release
- Stamina-based sprinting system
- Exhaustion mechanics
- Food-to-healing conversion
- Hunger system removal

---

## 🔮 Future Plans

- Configurable stamina values (in-game config menu)
- Armor weight affecting stamina drain
- Sound effects for exhaustion

*Want to see a feature? Let me know in the comments!*
